record.field: You will be redirected to DOKU's secure payment page. You can pay using QRIS, Virtual Account, or E-Wallet.

field.name: payment_method_ids
field.eval: [(6, 0, [ ref('payment.payment_method_qris'), ref('payment.payment_method_bank_bca'), ref('payment.payment_method_mandiri'), ref('payment.payment_method_bank_permata'), ref('payment.payment_method_bni'), ref('payment.payment_method_bri'), ref('payment.payment_method_cimb_niaga'), ref('payment.payment_method_ovo'), ref('payment.payment_method_dana'), ref('payment.payment_method_shopeepay'), ref('payment.payment_method_kredivo'), ref('payment.payment_method_akulaku'), ref('payment.payment_method_card') ])]
